alkylation reagent: consistent with Cys-ADP-ribosylation blocking alkylation by iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: 0.5 µg of Promega alkylated trypsin was added to each tube for overnight digestion
enrichment method: phosphoribosylated peptides were enriched using a TiO column
fragmentation method: The b and y ion series generated by collision-induced dissociation (CID) unambiguously identified Cys as the ADP-ribosylated amino acid
instrument: Thermo Electron Velos Pro Orbitrap mass spectrometer system
labeling: cells were switched to phenol red-free medium and FBS depleted of androgens 24 h before R1881 addition.
